tuition_rows_by_faculty_or_school.notes: The Financial Policies page lists Masters of Business Administration tuition at 170 USD per credit hour.
The Financial Policies page lists Masters of Education and Masters of Arabic Literature tuition at 170 USD per credit hour.

unmapped_programs.reason: The reviewed official GU sources did not publish a distinct numeric graduate tuition row for the Islamic Studies master.

notes: Program-level tuition remains null in research/gu/programs.json because tuition is centralized in research/gu/university.json.
The Financial Policies page also lists a 'PHD Arabic' tuition row, but no official PhD program evidence was recovered, so that row is not mapped to a program record.
All mapped tuition rows come from official GU sources only.
